_usage_local: Place at ~/.config/JetBrains/GlobalConfig/ or IDE-specific config (e.g. IntelliJIdea2024.3/options/). Can also configure via Settings → Tools → AI Assistant → Model Context Protocol (MCP) → Add
_usage_remote_ui: For remote: Use Settings → Tools → AI Assistant → MCP → Add → HTTP Server → paste URL (https://g.zombiecoder.my.id/mcp)
_feature_ssot: SSOT.md and .zombiecoder/ auto-created on MCP initialize — zero config
_note_jetbrains_format: Official JetBrains MCP JSON uses root key 'mcpServers' with 'command' + 'args' (stdio). For HTTP servers, use Settings UI or mcp-remote proxy. Docs: https://www.jetbrains.com/help/ai-assistant/mcp.html

zombiecoder-remote._description: ZombieCoder cloud bridge via mcp-remote proxy — SSOT auto-initialized, per-session RAG

zombiecoder-local._description: Local ZombieCoder bridge via mcp-remote proxy (requires: npm start)

zombiecoder-stdio._description: Standalone MCP server (use if bridge is not running — requires full project checkout)
